subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! The reality of contingent existence is sheer imperfection, and the essence of the Necessary Being is pure perfection, meaning that imperfection is inherent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی حقیقت امکان نقص صرفست و هویت وجوب کمال محض یعنی نقص از لوازم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @necessary and possible being, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal, @Manifestation of God as sun
